events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: since the submitted package lacks the quantity takeoff and conductor/conduit schedule needed to verify NEC Chapter 9 fill and Art. 358 requirements, the checkpoint is scored as `needs_more_info` (low risk, no defects evident from the photos themselves) rather than a pass/fail guess, with actions to obtain the missing takeoff, schedule, and additional support/bend-radius photos.
